title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.020 - Board defined
text:
334.020.  Board defined. — Whenever used in this chapter, unless expressly stated otherwise, the term "board" means the state board of registration for the healing arts in the state of Missouri.
(L. 1945 p. 1147 § 9992e, A.L. 1959 S.B. 50 § 1)
